ogTitle: Marnoo vs Marnoo East: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Marnoo and Marnoo East.
heading: Marnoo vs Marnoo East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Marnoo, Victoria and Marnoo East, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Marnoo East has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Marnoo (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Marnoo or Marnoo East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Marnoo has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Marnoo East scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Marnoo scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Marnoo East scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Marnoo or Marnoo East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Marnoo East has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
